Give<FF03>me money and I'll take away your pain.<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Trish<FF03>What do you say?<FF02><FF0E><1100><FF01> <FF1B>Trish<FF03>Okay.<FF02><FF01>  <FF1B>Trish<FF03>Umm, with the going rate for healing
<FF02><FF01> <FF1B>Trish<FF03>It'll be 3,000 yen!<FF03>That's okay, right?<FF02><FF0E> <FF01>  <FF1B>Trish<FF03>Great. Then here goes.<FF03>Pain, pain, go away.<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Trish<FF03>Phew

That should do it.<FF03>You're all good to go.<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Trish<FF03>Need anything else?<FF02><FF0E> <FF01><FF1B>Trish<FF03>You don't have enough.?
